
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the blue circular object

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From my current position and perception, I need to first navigate closer to get a better view of the objects. I can see what appears to be a circular blue object near P0, but I should verify this by getting closer and looking at it to confirm the color and shape before attempting to pick it up.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": 0.63,
  "y": 0.65,
  "z": 1.15
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Token usage:** prompt=6374, completion=160, total=6534
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Walk</strong></summary>

**Content**
Target position reached at \(x=0.47, y=0.08, z=1.35\)

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Now that I'm closer, I'll look at the area to get a better view of the objects.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": 0.63,
  "y": 0.65,
  "z": 1.15
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From my updated perception, I can see that object tagged as "37" appears to be a circular blue object. Based on the \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\), it's located at position \(x=0.91, y=0.62, z=0.93\). I will now attempt to pick up this object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "37"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762991346828, 'end': 1762991358308, 'elapsed': 11480}`

- **Token usage:** prompt=7861, completion=130, total=7991
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Successfully picked object 37

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the blue circular object as requested. The object was tagged as "37" in the environment and I was able to grasp it without any issues.
